entities.name: Banks

entities.name: Credit Unions

entities.name: Regulatory Capital
entities.context: Banking domain focused on capital requirements and risk weights

entities.name: ROE (Return on Equity)
entities.context: Key metric Felix aims to improve for banks without adding risk

entities.name: Risk Weights
entities.context: Technical element Felix's tool optimizes using banks' own data

relationships.context: Building this tool as his startup venture
